title: Splunk Security Advisories - 2026-05-20
description:
Merged 15 splunk security advisories published on 2026-05-20. Original advisory IDs: SVD-2026-0507, SVD-2026-0511, SVD-2026-0510, SVD-2026-0506, SVD-2026-0516, SVD-2026-0515, SVD-2026-0503, SVD-2026-0502, SVD-2026-0514, SVD-2026-0509, SVD-2026-0513, SVD-2026-0505, SVD-2026-0504, SVD-2026-0512, SVD-2026-0508

Titles:
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk AppDynamics Apache Web Server Agent - May 2026
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk AppDynamics Python Agent - May 2026
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk AppDynamics Cluster Agent - May 2026
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk Universal Forwarder - May 2026
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk Add-on for Tomcat App - May 2026
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk User Behavior Analytics - May 2026
- Sensitive Information Disclosure through Log Files in Splunk Enterprise
- Improper Access Control through Role Inheritance in Splunk AI Toolkit app
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk AppDynamics Machine Agent - May 2026
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk AppDynamics Database Agent - May 2026
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk AppDynamics Java Agent - May 2026
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk Enterprise - May 2026
- Denial of Service through coldToFrozen.sh Script in Splunk Enterprise
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk AppDynamics Private Synthetic Agent (PSA) - May 2026
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk AppDynamics Analytics Agent - May 2026

Mitigations and Workarounds
Turn Splunk AI Toolkit 5.7.2 and lower off until a patched version is available. See
Manage app and add-on objects
in the Splunk documentation.
If you must leave the app on, then perform one of the following options and restart the Splunk platform instance:
1. Edit the
$SPLUNK_HOME/etc/aps/Splunk_ML_Toolkit/defa
